# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# elasticsearch-snapshot-config.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-config
  namespace: operations
data:
  register-s3-repository.json: |
    {
      "type": "s3",
      "settings": {
        "bucket": "es-snapshots-prod",
        "base_path": "automated-backups",
        "region": "us-east-1",
        "compress": true,
        "readonly": false
      }
    }
  register-fs-repository.json: |
    {
      "type": "fs",
      "settings": {
        "location": "/mnt/elasticsearch-snapshots",
        "compress": true,
        "readonly": false
      }
    }
  create-snapshot.json: |
    {
      "indices": "*",
      "ignore_unavailable": true,
      "include_global_state": true,
      "metadata": {
        "taken_by": "operations-team",
        "purpose": "automated-backup"
      }
    }
  restore-snapshot.json: |
    {
      "indices": "*",
      "ignore_unavailable": true,
      "include_global_state": false,
      "rename_pattern": "(.+)",
      "rename_replacement": "restored_$1"
    }
---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-backup
  namespace: operations
spec:
  schedule: "0 2 * * *"
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      template:
        spec:
          restartPolicy: OnFailure
          containers:
            - name: snapshot-runner
              image: curlimages/curl:8.7.1
              env:
                - name: ELASTICSEARCH_URL
                  value: "http://elasticsearch:9200"
                - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY
                  value: "ops-s3-repo"
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - |
                  set -e
                  SNAPSHOT_NAME="snapshot-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
                  curl -sS -X PUT "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY}" \
                    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
                    --data-binary @/config/register-s3-repository.json
                  curl -sS -X PUT "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}?wait_for_completion=true" \
                    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
                    --data-binary @/config/create-snapshot.json
              volumeMounts:
                - name: snapshot-config
                  mountPath: /config
          volumes:
            - name: snapshot-config
              configMap:
                name: elasticsearch-snapshot-config
---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-restore
  namespace: operations
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      containers:
        - name: restore-runner
          image: curlimages/curl:8.7.1
          env:
            - name: ELASTICSEARCH_URL
              value: "http://elasticsearch:9200"
            - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY
              value: "ops-s3-repo"
            - name: SNAPSHOT_NAME
              value: "snapshot-20240101020000"
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              curl -sS -X POST "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore?wait_for_completion=true" \
                -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
                --data-binary @/config/restore-snapshot.json
          volumeMounts:
            - name: snapshot-config
              mountPath: /config
      volumes:
        - name: snapshot-config
          configMap:
            name: elasticsearch-snapshot-config
---
snapshot_repository:
  s3:
    method: PUT
    path: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo
    body:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: es-snapshots-prod
        base_path: automated-backups
        region: us-east-1
        compress: true
        readonly: false
  fs:
    method: PUT
    path: /_snapshot/ops-fs-repo
    body:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /mnt/elasticsearch-snapshots
        compress: true
        readonly: false
snapshot_create:
  method: PUT
  path: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/snapshot-{now/d}
  params:
    wait_for_completion: true
  body:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    metadata:
      taken_by: operations-team
      purpose: automated-backup
snapshot_restore:
  method: POST
  path: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/snapshot-20240101020000/_restore
  params:
    wait_for_completion: true
  body:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
